backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the school website backend with data stores and CRUD operations for contact form submissions, admission enquiries, news announcements, and a categorized image gallery using blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that 'Sanskrit' was removed and replaced with 'Urdu' in AcademicsPage and FacultyPage across the site.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short human-readable summaries describing the content and recent changes of each page and component.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in a ThemeProvider, and renders the shared Header/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the Woods Academy logo, contact details (phone, email, address), principal name, quick navigation links, and school stats.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the school logo, desktop nav links, and a collapsible mobile menu highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, refreshing dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP blockchain, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including news, gallery images, contact forms, admission enquiries, and gallery image uploads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind CSS and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static page component displaying Woods Academy's history, stats, core values, and milestone timeline from 2015 to 2024.
frontend/src/pages/AcademicsPage.tsx: Static page component presenting academic programs for Nursery–KG, Primary, and Middle school groups along with facilities and subject offerings using tabs and cards.
frontend/src/pages/AchievementsPage.tsx: Static page component showcasing Woods Academy's academic, sports, and cultural achievements with stats and categorized achievement cards.
frontend/src/pages/ActivitiesPage.tsx: Displays the school's co-curricular activities page with sections for sports, cultural events, arts, clubs, and other programs using static content and icon-decorated cards.
frontend/src/pages/AdmissionsPage.tsx: Renders the admissions page with a step-by-step process overview, document requirements list, and a form to submit admission enquiries via a React Query mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Provides a contact page showing school address, phone, email, and office hours alongside a contact form that submits messages through a React Query mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/FacultyPage.tsx: Shows the faculty page with school stats, department breakdowns by subject, and faculty values/philosophy using static data rendered in cards and badges.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Displays a filterable image gallery with category tabs (All, Events, Campus, Activities), loading skeletons, and a fallback static grid when no backend images are available.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page for Woods Academy, displaying a hero section, school stats, feature highlights, recent news from the backend, and a contact/footer area with school details.
frontend/src/pages/InfrastructurePage.ts: A static page describing the school's campus facilities (smart classrooms, labs, computers, library, sports, bus, security) with images and bullet-point details for each facility.
frontend/src/pages/NewsPage.tsx: Displays dynamic news items fetched from the backend alongside static important notices and announcements, with loading skeletons and formatted publication dates.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 9) for the Woods Academy school website, recording school details, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of completed feature updates.
